$comment: EVENT-RECAP template — recap a real talk / session / launch as a cinematic reel. METHOD (this is the creative part, not just the structure): (1) GROUND IN SOURCE — ingest the real transcript, slide deck (pdftoppm → assets/slides/), recording, and photos before authoring; never paraphrase numbers, dates, or names, and never guess from a photo when a transcript exists. (2) VERBATIM GOLD QUOTES carry the payoff — pull the highest-impact lines exactly; put them on code cards (generators garble text). (3) REAL VOICE on the apex quotes — if you have the recording, `scripts/extract-voice.mjs <project> '<quote>'` forced-aligns the speaker's actual voice; set scene `voiceover:` (beats TTS, blends with a TTS narrator on connective lines). (4) CREDIT/ETHOS ACCURACY — reflect the speaker's framing; if they credit the team, the recap credits the team (do not claim individual credit they disown). (5) PHOTOS — cull underexposed shots, colour-correct, and set visual.objectPosition to keep an off-centre subject in the 9:16 crop; stills get Ken-Burns via shot.motion. (6) ABSTRACT b-roll only — textless, on-brand, motivated (tension/time/redirect), never generic stock. Replace every REPLACE-ME and delete scenes you don't need.
title: REPLACE-ME
intent: REPLACE-ME — who this is for and what it must achieve. Name the real event + the one idea.

brand.music_style: restrained corporate-cinematic build, 70-90 BPM, no drop, ducked under voice
brand.tone: confident, earned, field-credible — a story with a takeaway, not a brag. Credit the team, not the self.

hook.text: REPLACE-ME — the single most arresting fact/number. Lands MUTED. Never a logo.

scenes.title: Hook — the number
scenes.tts_script: REPLACE-ME — say the stakes out loud; the number lives on the card.

scenes.title: B-roll — tension (abstract)
scenes.tts_script: REPLACE-ME — the stakes / the jeopardy, in one line.

visual.visual_brief: REPLACE-ME — ABSTRACT, textless, no faces; motivated by the tension (e.g. a thread about to snap). On-brand palette.

scenes.title: Protagonist on stage (real photo)
scenes.tts_script: REPLACE-ME — name the speaker + event; CREDIT THE TEAM, third person.

visual.visual_brief: REPLACE-ME — real, colour-corrected stage photo; Ken-Burns push. Add a small lower-third with name + role.

scenes.title: Pattern interrupt — the timeline
scenes.tts_script: REPLACE-ME — the turn that nearly went wrong.
sfx: impact hit on cut-in to card

scenes.title: Apex quote — REAL VOICE
scenes.tts_script: REPLACE-ME — the verbatim quote, exactly as spoken (used for captions + on-screen text).

scenes.title: The framework (screenshot card)
scenes.tts_script: REPLACE-ME — name the takeaway framework; credit the team's 95%.

scenes.title: Hero close — cover / poster
scenes.tts_script: REPLACE-ME — the outcome, in three words.

visual.visual_brief: REPLACE-ME — the polished cover/poster as the prestige close; slow push, music swells and fades.
